steps.code_example:
# Run quality control on FASTQ files
fastqc \
  -t 4 \
  -o fastqc_output/ \
  sample_R1.fastq.gz sample_R2.fastq.gz

# Trim adapter sequences with cutadapt
cutadapt \
  -a AGATCGGAAGAGCACACGTCTGAACTCCAGTCA \
  -A AGATCGGAAGAGCGTCGTGTAGGGAAAGAGTGT \
  -m 18 \
  -j 8 \
  -o trimmed_R1.fastq.gz \
  -p trimmed_R2.fastq.gz \
  sample_R1.fastq.gz sample_R2.fastq.gz

# Align RNA-seq reads with STAR
STAR \
  --runMode alignReads \
  --genomeDir /path/to/star_index \
  --readFilesIn sample_R1.fastq.gz sample_R2.fastq.gz \
  --readFilesCommand zcat \
  --runThreadN 8 \
  --outFileNamePrefix sample_ \
  --outSAMtype BAM SortedByCoordinate \
  --quantMode GeneCounts \
  --outSAMattributes NH HI AS NM MD

# Count reads per gene with featureCounts (Subread)
featureCounts \
  -a annotation.gtf \
  -o counts.txt \
  -T 8 \
  -p --countReadPairs \
  -B -C \
  -s 2 \
  aligned.bam

library(DESeq2)

# Load count matrix and sample metadata
counts <- read.csv('counts.csv', row.names = 1)
coldata <- read.csv('coldata.csv', row.names = 1)

# Create DESeqDataSet
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = counts,
  colData = coldata,
  design = ~ condition
)

# Run differential expression analysis
dds <- DESeq(dds)
res <- results(dds, contrast = c('condition', 'treated', 'control'))
res <- res[order(res$padj), ]

# Export significant results
sig <- subset(res, padj < 0.05 & abs(log2FoldChange) > 1)
write.csv(as.data.frame(sig), file = 'deseq2_results.csv')
